# OxyHelp Danmark

> Danish distributor of OxyHelp hyperbaric oxygen chambers. EU-produced hyperbaric chambers for clinics, wellness centers, and professional use in Denmark. B2B equipment sales and support.

## Pages
- [OxyHelp Danmark](https://oxyhelpdanmark.dk/): OxyHelp hyperbaric chamber sales and information for the Danish market
- [Investering og finansiering](https://oxyhelpdanmark.dk/investering.html): Investment overview, operating cost estimates, leasing and break-even model for an OxyHelp chamber
- [Franchise muligheder](https://oxyhelpdanmark.dk/franchise.html): Franchise and partnership opportunities for starting an HBOT clinic in Denmark

## Legal
- [Privatlivspolitik](https://oxyhelpdanmark.dk/privatlivspolitik.html): Privacy policy
- [Vilkår](https://oxyhelpdanmark.dk/vilkaar.html): Terms of use
